steps.title: Match the singular industry
steps.content: The antecedent is a given industry, which is singular. The main clause therefore needs a singular pronoun that refers back naturally to that industry.

steps.title: Pick the natural pronoun
steps.content: Choice B and Choice C are plural, so they do not agree with industry. Choice D uses this, which does not naturally refer back as the subject of consists. The singular pronoun fits. The answer is A.
